prompt:
A small rooftop-mounted 500 W three-blade horizontal-axis wind turbine with its brake mechanism visible, wired down to a compact charge controller and DC bus junction box. The wiring is neatly clipped and weatherproofed, emphasizing a tested, anchored installation.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 with a grounded near-future renewable-energy aesthetic: soft natural lighting, realistic materials, no logos, no readable text, no overlays. Compose so the turbine and the visible wiring/charge controller connection read clearly at icon scale.
